sys_security_acl.description: Allow write for records in x_1871156_ngo_do_0_document_approval, if the ACL script returns true.
sys_security_acl.name: x_1871156_ngo_do_0_document_approval

sys_update_version.name: sys_security_acl_94bac1c0ab3276108d3ad54a525ec9c2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type/><description>Allow write for records in x_1871156_ngo_do_0_document_approval, if the ACL script returns true.</description><local_or_existing/><name>x_1871156_ngo_do_0_document_approval</name><operation display_value="write">write</operation><script><![CDATA[answer = false;

if (gs.hasRole('x_1871156_ngo_do_0.approver') || gs.hasRole('x_1871156_ngo_do_0.admin') || (gs.hasRole('x_1871156_ngo_do_0.submitter') && gs.getUserName() == current.sys_created_by && current.status != 'submitted') || current.isNewRecord()) 
    answer = true;]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-27 15:20:34</sys_created_on><sys_id>94bac1c0ab3276108d3ad54a525ec9c2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_1871156_ngo_do_0_document_approval</sys_name><sys_package display_value="NGO Donation & Distribution Management" source="x_1871156_ngo_do_0">40bac1c0d23276105c93871d08abce28</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="NGO Donation & Distribution Management">40bac1c0d23276105c93871d08abce28</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_94bac1c0ab3276108d3ad54a525ec9c2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-27 15:20:34</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>
